Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I need to identify activities that recur within cases and rename them to reflect context

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C001 Verify Documents appears twice first at 0920 after initiation and second at 1030 after customer submits ID scan So the first Verify Documents is initial verification second time is re verification after customer submits additional docs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C002 Call Customer appears twice first at 0900 outbound call to clarify discrepancy and second at 0950 follow up call to confirm adjustments So Call Customer has two contexts initial clarification call and follow up confirmation call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C003 Verify Documents appears twice first at 1125 initial verification of ID and second at 1220 re verify after account adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We might have two distinct names for Verify Documents Initial Document Verification and Re verification after Document Submission or Re verification after Account Adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The only activities that recur are Verify Documents and Call Customer

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For C001 first Verify Documents Initial Document Verification second Re verification after Document Submission

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For C003 first Verify Documents Initial Document Verification second Re verification after Account Adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For C002 first Call Customer Initial Clarification Call second Follow up Confirmation Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Initiate Request only once per case Approve Request only once per case Adjust Account only once each so no conflict

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C001 revised activity names include Initial Document Verification and Re verification after Document Submission

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C002 revised activity names include Initial Clarification Call and Follow up Confirmation Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C003 revised activity names include Initial Document Verification and Re verification after Account Adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Initial Document Verification is used for the first occurrence because it represents the initial check of the documents Re verification after Document Submission is triggered by customer submission Re verification after Account Adjustment is triggered by internal adjustment
